sentences.sentence: Welcome to the aquatic center.
Please store your bags in a locker.
Lifeguards are on duty during all open hours.
Showering before entering the pool is required.
Swim tests can be scheduled at the front desk.
If you dive in shallow water, you risk a serious injury.
Running on the deck will result in a warning and possible removal from the pool.
Paint cans are stacked beside the counter.
Power tools are kept inside the back room.
Small parts and screws sit on the right shelf.
Brackets, bolts, and brass fittings are sorted into labeled trays.
Lumber and plywood are stored along the back wall by length.
Garden supplies, including soil and fertilizer, are available near the side door.
For specialty items, such as electrical fittings or plumbing connectors, please check the printed aisle guide that hangs by the entrance.

sentences.sentence: If you need help getting around, check the building map posted near the elevator on each floor.

Daily specials are listed on the central menu board.
Allergen labels are placed beside every hot food station.

You can refill drinks at the beverage island near the windows.

If you have any dietary questions, check the printed allergen guide located near the front information desk.

sentences.sentence: First, choose your departure date.
Next, select your seating preference.
Then, enter your passport details into the form.
Confirm that the dates match your travel plans.
Review the cancellation policy carefully before payment.
Submit your booking and wait for the confirmation email.
If you experience any payment issues, contact our office before your departure date.
First, rinse the lettuce thoroughly.
Next, tear the leaves into bite-sized pieces.
Then, slice the tomatoes into thin wedges.
Add cucumber slices and a generous handful of olives.
Whisk the olive oil and vinegar together in a small bowl.
Season the dressing with salt, pepper, and a pinch of herbs.
Once everything is mixed together, taste the salad and adjust the seasoning before serving.
First, prepare your watercolor palette.
Next, soak your brush in clean water.
Sketch the basic outline using a soft pencil.
Apply the lightest colors first across the entire paper.
Allow each layer to dry completely before adding new colors.
Add darker shadows once your background tones have settled.
If you make a mistake, gently lift the wet color with a clean dry cloth.
